metadata.description: Complete ground truth labels for all C₁–C₅ constraints
metadata.note: TRUE = constraint satisfied (PASS), FALSE = constraint violated (FAIL)

WD-05.notes: Black ice at 2°C - C3 violation (impossible physics)

WD-05a.notes: Black ice at -2°C - all constraints satisfied

WD-05b.notes: Black ice at 5°C - C3 violation (impossible physics)

WD-06.notes: Fog + tailgating - C5 violation (missing wet roads)

WD-07.notes: Wind-blown banner - C2 spatial, C3 mechanism, C5 completeness violations

WD-08.notes: Snow on mountain road - C2 spatial (missing location context), C3 mechanism, C5 completeness

WD-14.notes: Fog + wet road - C5 violation (missing curve geometry)

WD-16.notes: Flash flood - C2 spatial (underpass location), C5 completeness

WD-20.notes: Hydroplaning on curve - C2 spatial (curve location), C5 completeness

TA-01.notes: Unsafe lane change - all constraints satisfied

TA-02.notes: Red light violation - all constraints satisfied

TA-06.notes: Speeding on curve - C2 spatial (curve location), C3 mechanism (missing physics)

TA-14.notes: Tailgating on wet road - all constraints satisfied

RM-01.notes: Unmarked lane closure - all constraints satisfied

RM-07.notes: Trench collapse - C3 mechanism, C5 completeness violations

RM-11.notes: Wet paint - C2 spatial (curve location), C3 mechanism, C5 completeness

PE-06.notes: Concert ingress - C5 violation (missing processing rate)

PE-12.notes: Stadium match - C2 spatial (roundabout location), C5 completeness

PE-13.notes: Art fair - C5 violation (missing screening capacity)

PE-15.notes: Ramadan souq - C5 violation (missing drop zone capacity)
